items.title: Token flow
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  A[Your prompt text] --> B[Tokenizer]
  B --> C[Token IDs]
  C --> D[Transformer layers]
  D --> E[Next-token probabilities]
  E --> F[Decode / sample]
  F --> G[Response text]
  G -->|append| C
items.caption: High-level inference loop: text becomes tokens, the model scores likely next tokens, and decoding repeats until the response ends.

items.title: Context window boundary
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  subgraph window["Context window (fixed max tokens)"]
    S[System + user messages]
    T[Tool results / attachments]
    R[Claude reply in progress]
  end
  X[Content beyond window] -.->|invisible to model| window
items.caption: Everything must fit inside the context window; overflow is dropped or must be summarized outside the model.
